---
description: "Quick commit and push all changes. Use when user says 'commit code nhé' or wants to commit."
---

Commit and push all staged and unstaged changes to the remote repository.

## Steps
1. Run `git add -A` to stage all changes
2. Generate a concise, descriptive English commit message based on the changes
3. Run `git commit -m "<message>"`
4. Run `git push`
5. Report the commit hash and summary in Vietnamese
